description: Axesso is a data service provider that offers managed web-scraping APIs and datasets for sites such as Amazon, Zillow, Walmart, Yahoo Finance, and others. Its service returns structured real-time data from third-party websites for use in customer applications.
summary: Axesso exposes one documented HTTP REST API surface, the Axesso Api at `http://api.axesso.de`, with published OpenAPI specs and no authentication declared in the available specs.
